description_long: This object is a retro-style portable radio receiver with a rectangular body finished in a glossy orange color. The front face features a large black panel with two round dials and a wide, horizontally-striped speaker grille in beige, giving it a classic appearance. On top, there are three metallic buttons and a telescopic metal antenna, which can be extended for better signal reception. The radio is equipped with a sturdy metallic handle that arches over the top, allowing for easy carrying. The sides are smooth and rounded, with a visible tuning knob on one side. The back panel is solid black, likely serving as a battery compartment or access panel.
description: A retro orange portable radio with a black front panel, metallic handle, and extendable antenna, featuring dials and a striped speaker grille.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved orange body, metallic handle, and the antenna resting along the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black panel with two dials, a beige-striped speaker grille, and three metallic buttons on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the smooth orange surface, handle, and a visible tuning knob.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid black back panel with no visible controls or openings.
